title: Lifecycle disposers + patch split + own patchMethod
goal: Split patcher.ts, create DisposerRegistry and patchMethod() that restores originals, wire ALL resources to dispose on shutdown/unload: patches, notifier, Plugins observer, listeners, stats patch, MenuManager menus.
in_scope: Create src/lifecycle.ts with Disposer, DisposerRegistry, patchMethod()
patchMethod() saves original and restores on dispose (replaces ztoolkit.Patch)
Split patcher.ts into 3 files under src/modules/patches/
Scope BulkDuplicates window state per Window (WeakMap or closure); remove singleton this.win
registerNotifier returns Disposer calling Notifier.unregisterObserver + Plugins.removeObserver
Remove feature import from ztoolkit.ts: unregisterNonDuplicatesSection() call removed from unregisterAll()
acceptance: patcher.ts deleted, 3 patch files use patchMethod()
patchMethod() test verifies: original restored on dispose, skip restore + log when target externally modified
rg 'new ztoolkit\.Patch|ztoolkit\.Patch' src/ returns 0 (entire src/, including duplicateStats.ts)
ztoolkit.ts has no feature module imports (unregisterNonDuplicatesSection removed from unregisterAll)
tests/lifecycle.test.ts >= 10 test cases (LIFO, async, double-dispose, patchMethod, compositeDisposer)
MANUAL: disable/re-enable leaves no stacked wrappers, menus, observers
